outcomes.decisionNote: Awaiting human provider-specific permitted-use review. Pending does not authorize source use, public display, Supabase reads, SQL, ingestion, storage, Supabase public data posture, or scoreSource=real.
Awaiting human attribution review for page, report, API/file, download, screenshot, and fallback wording. Pending keeps attribution unapproved.
Awaiting human redistribution review for raw values, transformed rows, exports, cached responses, and downstream copies. Pending keeps redistribution blocked.
Awaiting human retention review for storage window, deletion posture, cache policy, audit trail, and rollback ownership. Pending keeps source-derived storage blocked.
Awaiting human rate-limit and outage handling review. Pending does not authorize remote reads, retries, scheduling, or provider access.
Awaiting human review for delay, freshness, partial coverage, missing sessions, stale state, and public display limits. Pending keeps public real-data display blocked.
Awaiting human derived-score use review. Pending keeps scoreSource=mock and blocks real-data score influence, ranking, recommendation, and confidence claims.
